Screenshot & Screen Video Record by Screeny
The #1 Screen Recorder and Screenshot tool! Full page screen capture and video record of your screen.

This is an easy tool for taking screenshots and recording videos from your screen. It can do about anything you want a screen recording and screen capture app to do. Capture screen in various ways, with editing functionality, and can also capture full videos.

SCREENSHOT

Take a FULL webpage screenshot or capture a selected area or visible part. Then, edit and save it to PDF/JPEG/PNG, upload to google drive, clipboard or share by link.

Perform screen capture. Save screenshots to PDF or images. Instant screenshots are stored locally and produce no traffic. The screenshot tool can work offline.

✓ Save to disk as PDF, PNG, and JPEG.
✓ Capture only the visible part of the web page or just a selection.
✓ Send to Google Drive.
✓ Copy to clipboard.
✓  Resize or crop to the size you need.
✓ Annotate with rectangles, circles, arrows, lines, etc.
✓ Add text, and change the font and size.
✓ Highlight essential parts.

SCREEN RECORDER

Record your screen and instantly get a link to share with anyone. It’s the fastest and easiest way to screen capture and stay connected with your team. Whether you’re screen recording a product demo, giving feedback, or simply sharing your thoughts, the screen recorder makes it simple to stay in the loop with async video. 

✓ Record video on your desktop, current tab or camera to make a screencast.
✓ Include your face in your screen video recording by embedding your webcam.
✓ Include your voice in the screencast with a microphone option
✓ Save recordings to the local disk.
✓ Save recordings to your Google Drive.
✓ Download uploaded videos in WebM or MP4 format.
✓ Instantly get a shareable link to a video after finishing recording.

As you can see, there are a ton of different options available for you out there. If you want to capture your screen, be it as a screenshot or recording, then this Chrome extension can help you.
Screen capture and recorder - Screenshot Tool
Record screen and camera, screenshot, edit, and share via Google Drive

Unveiling a Comprehensive Screen Capture and Screen Recorder Tool

Navigating the world of screenshots and screen recordings just became simpler. This versatile tool is your one-stop solution for all your screen capture and screen recording needs, designed with a vast array of features tailored for today's digital age.

⚡SCREEN CAPTURE FEATURES⚡

⭐ The screenshot function lets you effortlessly capture a full webpage, a designated section, or just the currently visible area.

⭐ After making a screen capture, you can immediately dive into editing, then save in formats like PDF, JPEG, and PNG.

⭐ Quick storage ensures no lag, and the offline mode offers screen capture without any data worries.

❗ Elevate your screenshots with powerful editing tools:
   👉 Easy sharing to Google Drive or through a link.
   👉 Copy your screen captures to your clipboard instantly.
   👉 Resize, crop, and tailor your captures.
   👉 Annotations with various shapes, perfect for highlighting.
   👉 Insert and modify text to convey more with your screenshot.
   👉 Emphasize vital points with the highlight feature.

⚡SCREEN RECORDER FEATURES⚡

⭐ Dive into the seamless world of screen recording with this tool, allowing you to grab videos and get an immediate sharing link, making collaborations a breeze.

⭐ From product walkthroughs to feedback rounds, the screen recorder ensures you stay synced with your team, thanks to the async video feature.

❗ Screen recorder capabilities include:
   👉 Recording your desktop, a particular browser tab, or your camera feed.
   👉 Integrate your reactions into the screen recording by embedding your webcam.
   👉 Add a personal touch with voiceovers via the microphone option.
   👉 Store your recordings either locally or on Google Drive.
   👉 Choice of WebM or MP4 download formats.
   👉 Instant sharing links after each recording session.

In sum, for those seeking a robust screenshot, and screen recorder tool, this Chrome extension is the answer, housing a myriad of options for all your capturing and recording desires.
Share your desktop or application using VIA Screen Share [Minimum VIA Version 2.5]

VIA App wirelessly mirrors your Chromebook / PC Chrome browser screen to a display using a VIA device. Just add the VIA App to your Chromebook or PC Chrome browser and login to start presenting. VIA turns any screen into a meeting point for ideas to stream freely without conventional restrictions that use up meeting resources. VIA is a wireless audio-visual integrator that connects to an existing wireless network and links every device in a meeting room to the primary presentation screen. VIA gateways are real BYOD Wireless Collaboration devices for all your presentation needs.

Mirror your device to any computer screen any time

Crestron AirMedia® Wireless Presentation solutions enable seamless collaboration in any space. Share audio and video content from the Google Chrome® browser to an in-room Crestron collaboration system. 

*  Connect to AirMedia® receiver devices on the network. 
*  Share a particular Chrome® browser tab (audio and video), or your complete desktop (video only). 
*  Multiple users can connect and present screens simultaneously.  

The Crestron AirMedia Sender for Chrome requires a compatible AirMedia device (such as AirMedia Series 3 receivers, AirMedia 2.0 receivers, or a device with integrated AirMedia functionality (Crestron Mercury® conference system and Crestron DMPS). 

Learn more at Crestron.com/AirMedia
MT Auto Clicker is your go-to tool for automating repetitive tasks on your system.

Stop wasting time on repetitive online tasks. MT Auto Clicker is a completely free browser extension that automates clicking, scrolling, form-filling, and more in one powerful tool.

Whether you’re endlessly scrolling through Instagram Reels, clicking through games, or filling out lengthy forms, this free auto clicker extension handles the tedious work so you can focus on what matters.

Perfect For:
•	Social Media Users - Auto-scroll through Instagram Reels and YouTube Shorts
•	Gamers & Testers - Automate clicking sequences and repetitive actions
•	Professionals - Fill forms instantly and capture screen content
•	Content Creators - Record screens and take professional screenshots


Core Automation Features

Smart Auto Clicking
•	Single-point auto clicking with precise 1ms intervals
•	Multi-target clicking sequences for complex tasks
•	Touch and hold for drag-and-drop operations
•	Customizable timing and duration controls
Content Browsing
•	Auto-scroll for social media feeds and videos
•	Auto-refresh for monitoring websites and pages
•	Auto-swipe for dating apps and galleries
•	Multi-level zoom control across platforms
Productivity Tools
•	Smart form filling with XPath detection
•	Screen recording in multiple formats (MP4, WEBM, MKV)
•	Screenshot capture with built-in editor
•	Full-page and selective area capture

POCU Proctor

This extension enables POCU to view your screen, and collect webcam and audio feeds when you take an online examination on POCU - https://test.pocu.academy. We only collect this information on pocu.academy, and we do not have access to your screen, webcam and audio feeds if you are not on pocu.academy domain.

POCU collects the student's screen, webcam and audio feeds to detect plagiarism or cheating during an online exam.

By installing this extension, you are giving POCU permission to view your screen, and collect webcam and audio feeds during an examination.
Help people to get real time transcript.

Live Transcript Extension

Universal Platform Support: Our extension seamlessly integrates with a variety of web-based platforms, including Google Meet, Zoom, Youtube, Spotify, and other web audio/video or meeting services.

Security & Privacy Assurance: Rest assured, your data and transcripts are kept secure, as the entire transcription process takes place on your own system. No data is transmitted to external servers or the cloud for processing.

Unrestricted Word and Time Usage: Experience the freedom of unlimited transcription – there are no limits on the number of words or the duration it can transcribe. Use it as often as needed, without any constraints on word count or time duration.

Completely Free: Access the full range of features our extension offers without incurring any charges. It's available to everyone, globally, completely free of charge.

No Registration or Credit Card Required: Your privacy matters to us. We do not mandate any registration, nor do we collect personal contact information for marketing or data-selling purposes.

Download Transcripts: You have the option to download transcriptions for further processing, enabling you to capture summaries, action items, and more using ChatGPT.

Integration with Google Drive: You can choose to upload your transcriptions directly to your Google Drive. By default, the extension does not save your transcripts to Drive.

Limitations: Currently supports English language only.

Continuous Improvement and Feedback:
At Lakebrains, we are committed to continuously enhancing this extension to better serve your needs. We greatly value your feedback and welcome any suggestions or comments you may have. If there are specific features you'd like to see added to the tool, please don't hesitate to reach out to us at support@lakebrains.in. Your input is invaluable in making this extension even more efficient and user-friendly.

Screen Recorder is the premier tool for screen recording in the industry , it empowers individuals to capture their screens, express their ideas visually, and provide asynchronous feedback effortlessly. With Screen Recorder, you can seamlessly record your screen and receive an instant link to share with anyone. It offers the quickest and most convenient method for screen capture, enabling you to stay connected with your team effortlessly. Whether you're demonstrating a product, offering feedback, or sharing your insights, Screen Recorder simplifies the process, keeping you engaged with asynchronous video communication.

**Key Features:**

- Capture your screen, camera, microphone, and internal audio.
- Maintain control over who can access your videos with security settings.
- Download recordings directly to your camera roll.

**Screen Recorder Features:**

- Enjoy free screen, camera, or dual recording.
- Record in various resolutions, including 720p, 1080p, 1440p, or 4k HD.
- Customize videos with camera frames, backgrounds, and effects like blurring.

**Comprehensive Video Communication:**

- Save recorded videos directly to your device for convenient access.

**About Screen Recorder:**

- Screen Recorder is the premier video communication platform for asynchronous work.
- Engineered for simplicity and speed, it enables users to record, watch, and share videos seamlessly, whether at their desks or on the go.

Chrome full page screenshot and screen capture extension with professional editing tools and project management

ShotMyPage - Chrome Full Page Screenshot and Screen Capture Extension

The complete Chrome full page screen capture solution. Automatically captures entire web pages, long articles, and complete websites with intelligent scrolling technology. Professional editing tools let you annotate and save your captures as projects.

KEY FEATURES

• Full Page Screenshot - Capture entire web pages automatically with intelligent scrolling
• Chrome Screenshot - Perfect screen capture for any website or application  
• Full Page Screen Capture - Revolutionary scrolling technology handles any page length
• Chrome Screen Capture - Multiple capture modes for every screenshot need
• Screenshot Editing - Professional annotation and drawing tools built-in

CAPTURE MODES

• Full Page Screen Capture - Automatically scrolls and captures entire web pages, no matter how long. Perfect for documentation, research, and sharing complete website content.
• Chrome Screenshot - Instant capture of visible screen area with one click. Fast and efficient for quick screenshots.
• Custom Area Selection - Select and capture specific regions of any webpage with pixel-perfect precision.

PROFESSIONAL EDITING TOOLS

Complete editing suite including:
• Selection tool for moving and editing shapes
• Rectangle tool for drawing rectangles
• Circle tool for drawing circles  
• Arrow tool for drawing directional arrows
• Line tool for drawing straight lines
• Text tool for adding custom text annotations
• Highlight tool for emphasizing important areas
• Blur tool for privacy protection and sensitive content
• Pencil drawing and freehand annotations
• Emoji insertion for engaging screenshots
• Precise cropping tools for perfect framing

EXPORT OPTIONS

Export your finished screenshots in multiple formats:
• PNG format with transparent backgrounds
• JPG format with customizable quality settings
• High-resolution exports up to 15MB file size
• Perfect quality preservation for professional use

SMART PROJECT MANAGEMENT

Save your work-in-progress as projects with all layers and annotations preserved. Return anytime to continue editing or create variations of your screenshots. Perfect for iterative design work and documentation.

LARGE FILE SUPPORT

Advanced storage system handles screenshots up to 15MB using intelligent compression and local IndexedDB storage. Optimized for high-resolution displays and extra-long web pages without performance issues.

FULL-PAGE INTELLIGENCE

Revolutionary full page screen capture automatically handles:
• Sticky headers and navigation bars
• Dynamically loaded content and infinite scroll
• Complex page layouts and responsive designs
• JavaScript-heavy websites and SPAs
• Creates perfect seamless screenshots every time

PERFECT FOR

• Full page website screenshots for documentation and presentations
• Long article capture for research, studying, and content sharing
• Complete webpage screenshots for client presentations and proposals
• Website mockup capture for design reviews and feedback
• Tutorial creation with full page content and annotations
• Bug reporting with entire page context for developers
• Content archiving and webpage preservation for future reference

ADVANCED CAPABILITIES

• Intelligent scrolling algorithm for flawless full-page captures
• Layer-based editing system preserves all annotations and modifications
• Export to PNG and JPG with customizable quality settings
• Keyboard shortcuts for efficient workflow and power users
• Responsive design works perfectly on any screen size
• Memory-efficient handling of large images and complex screenshots

NO BLOAT - COMPLETE PRIVACY

• All data stored locally on your device - no cloud storage required
• No user tracking or behavior monitoring
• No data collection or analytics of any kind
• No external servers or third-party services
• Complete privacy protection - your screenshots never leave your computer
• Zero bloatware - only essential screenshot functionality
• Lightweight extension with minimal system impact

WHY CHOOSE SHOTMYPAGE?

Unlike basic Chrome screenshot extensions that only capture visible area, ShotMyPage provides complete full page screen capture functionality. Our intelligent technology automatically handles scrolling and combines content for perfect full page screenshots. Save your captures as projects, add professional annotations, and export high-quality images.

The most comprehensive Chrome full page screenshot solution available.

• Free to use with no limitations or hidden fees
• No account required - works immediately after installation
• Offline functionality - no internet connection needed
• Regular updates with new features and improvements

Transform how you capture and communicate visual information today with ShotMyPage.

GETTING STARTED

1. Click the ShotMyPage icon in your Chrome toolbar
2. Choose "Capture Screen" for full screen or "Select Area" for specific region
3. Screenshot automatically opens in the built-in editor
4. Use the editing tools:
• Selection tool - for moving and adjusting shapes
• Rectangle tool - drawing rectangles
• Circle tool - drawing circles
• Arrow tool - drawing directional arrows
• Line tool - drawing straight lines
• Text tool - adding text annotations
• Highlight tool - emphasizing important areas
• Blur tool - privacy protection for sensitive content
5. Adjust colors and sizes of all tools
6. Save your final image as PNG or JPG format

Download ShotMyPage now and experience the most powerful Chrome full page screen capture extension available.
AI-Powered Facial Recognition & Reverse Image Search for Enhanced Privacy

Face Search AI – Reverse Image Search & Face Verification

Easily verify faces and detect scammers with a single click.

The Face Search AI Chrome extension lets you perform instant, AI-powered reverse image searches directly from your browser. Designed for quick and accurate face recognition, it scans millions of profiles to help you identify people, verify identities, and stay safe online.

📷 How to use the extension
With Face Search AI, you can search for faces without leaving the website. Simply:

Search by image: Right-click on any image and select "Search with Face Search AI" to start an instant face verification.

Search by selection: Select part of a page (such as a cropped photo), right-click, and choose "Search with Face Search AI".

No need to manually download or upload images — the extension handles everything seamlessly in the background.

📷 What you can find with Face Search AI

People: Verify if a person appears elsewhere online.

Duplicates: Detect identical or near-identical profile photos to spot impersonation or fraud.

Similar faces: Find images with similar facial features for cross-verification.

Online presence: Check if a face is linked to multiple accounts or websites.

📷 Advanced search features (available on facesearchai.com)

Keyword filtering: Combine face search with keywords (e.g., “LinkedIn” or “dating site”).

Domain-specific search: Restrict results to a specific website or platform.

Sort results:

Newest / Oldest – See when a face first appeared online.

Best match / Similar match – Sort by match accuracy.

Alerts: Set up alerts for a specific face to get notified when new results appear.

Collections: Save and organize search results for future reference.

📷 For Developers
Integrate face search into your own tools with our Face Search AI API for automated, high-accuracy face recognition at scale.

🔍 Start verifying faces instantly — protect yourself from scammers and impersonators with Face Search AI.

Utilitário para compartilhamento da tela do computador do organizador ou do apresentador durante uma reunião ou apresentação

A extensão WebCoachMe Screensharing permite aos organizadores de reuniões na plataforma WebCoachMe compartilhar suas telas com os participantes de forma fácil e eficiente. Ideal para sessões de coaching, apresentações e reuniões colaborativas, esta extensão garante que todos os participantes possam visualizar o conteúdo exibido pelo organizador em tempo real.

Funcionalidades Principais:

* Compartilhamento de Tela: Compartilhe sua tela inteira ou uma janela específica com os participantes da reunião.
* Sem Complicações: Não é necessário realizar downloads complicados ou inscrições adicionais.
* Integração Perfeita: Funciona diretamente na plataforma WebCoachMe, proporcionando uma experiência de usuário fluida.
* Segurança e Privacidade: Garantimos a segurança dos dados compartilhados durante as reuniões.
* Interatividade em Tempo Real: Facilite a colaboração ao permitir que os participantes vejam exatamente o que o organizador está exibindo, em tempo real.
